text:
I can see the issue now. When the app loads, it sets both `fromToken` and `toToken` to the same default token (the native token) on lines 257 and 259. This causes the error "Input and output currencies don't match" because you're trying to swap the same token to itself.

The fix is to ensure that when setting default tokens, the `toToken` should be different from the `fromToken`. Let me fix this:
